Content: After 3rd beta update adaptive brightness and extra brightness not working display is going dull pls provide solution _x000d_
Here is a Video off problem_x000d_

The issue still persists after today's beta update (09 February 2026)._x000d_ Please see the attached video. In fact, I noticed another issue while setting the wallpaper and choosing the auto adjusting clock font. The new issue is that the colour of the clock changes to White and to red on its own. You can see this issue in the video attached._x000d_
Dear Samsung,_x000d_ After updating oneui 8.5 my device battery drains faster please relsove the issue and when will S25 Ultra gets onui 8.5 stable update.._x000d_
Am I communicating with a human Samsung representative or an automated robot. My question is regarding excessive delay in monthly security update. Can anyone really resolve this issue ._x000d_
I'm now seriously frustrated by this issue, I wanted to change the settings of my buds but I can't access it. When the update will be available which fixes the issue?_x000d_

I can see that the battery drains quite faster while not doing any heavy tasks. I usually use my device only for calls and some social media applications. I rarely play any games but still battery drains faster than expected. _x000d_
[SHealth] Execercise > After workout finish > The HR recovery chart looks not correct._x000d_ _x000d_ High bpm showing in last. The graph seems not correct or confusing._x000d_
When will the 8.5 beta update come out? could you please tell me the date when it will come out? Please tell me._x000d_
My mobile is s25 and from 2 days i am facing issue with earbuds case charging status issue, sometimes it shows charging status numerical value some time it shows 0 on Sane time_x000d_
The mobile is not able to connect to network. _x000d_
Wrong weather notifications. There is no rain nor rainfall but weather notification shows rain to stop soon._x000d_
Samsung health doesn't sync timely in the background. It takes quite a while to get the app synced. Sometimes the app doesn't load up. _x000d_
Every time when I capturing photos from 10MP telephoto camera , results worst photo and inaccurate faded colors, _x000d_ All other cameras properly working._x000d_
I charged my phone from 18% to 92 % at super fast charging. There was no background apps and only wifi was connected. The back of my phone was a little hot_x000d_

I'm right now using Dark mode. Show some specific applications, and I noticed some system applications when I using. It's a downside pop-up showing like normal without Dark mode. Yes, I see. This is the screenshot showing like A. Not this only application, some fuel system. I notice. it multiple times like this_x000d_

I am using a Galaxy S25 on One UI 8.5 beta 2, and the device heats a lot even with normal use. It's currently winter, yet after using normal social media apps like Instagram, Twitter, WhatsApp, and Telegram, the device heats up significantly. Please fix this issue; otherwise, it will become a serious problem in summer._x000d_

On One UI 8.5 beta 2 (Galaxy S25), Live Notifications are working correctly for multiple apps (Maps, Media Player, Google Finance, etc.), but Google Sports does not appear as an option in the Live Notifications / Now Bar list._x000d_ The Google app shows “Pin live score” for cricket matches, confirming Google-side support is enabled, yet Sports live updates are not exposed to the system UI, while other S25 users on the same beta reportedly have Google Sports available._x000d_ This appears to be an inconsistency in Live Notifications integration or app-category exposure for Google Sports on this device/account._x000d_
Unable to connect to wifi calling.... in previous version it fine but now it's so irritating and automatically disconnected with wifi calling._x000d_
Phone heats up little bit more while playing music on phone speaker_x000d_
Battery backup is low on this beta version_x000d_
Some good lock modules does not work_x000d_
The pentastic air gesture type setting is not working with One UI8.5. Whenever the new gesture type is selected_x000d_ only the default menu is in effect._x000d_
Wifi Auto off feature not working properly. Even when I am area with known and trusted wifi, it's still off._x000d_
Andriod Auto consumes too much battery and smartphone get too much heated _x000d_
Wrong weather conditions shown. When it is sunny, it is showing rain will stop soon_x000d_
Multiple time i felt microphone voice not going to online person during normal calls_x000d_
Normally by battery draining by 50% fastly. Now after beta update i have to charge my phone multiple times_x000d_

The position of the lockscreen clock and widgets changes automatically, It generally comes down towards the bottom of the screen , from the initial position where I set them. And of course the battery backup had gone down drastically too._x000d_
Sometimes over heat while using few apps_x000d_

Dark mode doesn't turns on automatically as per the custom schedule that I set, I have to turn off and then turn on the schedule switch manually , for it to turn to dark. I have been noticing this issue in ZZA3 build for quite sometime. _x000d_
Calender opening everytime I open my phone it is happening EVERYTIME_x000d_
When will the 8.5 beta update come out? could you please tell me the date when it will come out? Please._x000d_
0.6× camera flickering on focusing _x000d_
Where is the next one ui 8.5 beta update_x000d_

Title: [S24/VZW] [SQE India] [Framework] [Samsung Dex/Window Snapping] App folders are opening in background after window snapping is executed.
Problem: [Noida][Always] [#1EA] Precondition: Wired Dex Connected State none. Occurrence Process: Dex > open any app like gallery, settings, etc.> window snapping > snap to left > open any app folder from task bar > observe. Occurrence Status: App folders are opening in background after window snapping is executed. Expected Result: There should open in foreground just like other apps. Note: video, logs attached.
